title: Freshworks Ticket
description: A support or service desk ticket common across Freshdesk and Freshservice products. Tickets represent customer or employee requests for assistance, incidents, or service requests.

subject.description: Subject line summarizing the ticket request.

description.description: HTML-formatted description of the ticket with full details of the request.

description_text.description: Plain text version of the ticket description.

type.description: Category type of the ticket (e.g., Question, Incident, Problem, Feature Request, Service Request).

source.description: Source channel through which the ticket was created. 1=Email, 2=Portal, 3=Phone, 7=Chat, 9=Feedback Widget, 10=Outbound Email.

requester_id.description: ID of the requester (contact or employee) who raised the ticket.

responder_id.description: ID of the agent assigned to handle the ticket.

group_id.description: ID of the agent group to which the ticket is assigned.

company_id.description: ID of the associated company (Freshdesk) or department (Freshservice).

product_id.description: ID of the product or service associated with the ticket.

tags.description: Labels or tags applied to the ticket for categorization.

due_by.description: Timestamp by which the ticket should be resolved.

fr_due_by.description: Timestamp by which the first response to the ticket is due.

is_escalated.description: Indicates whether the ticket has been escalated due to SLA breach.

custom_fields.description: Key-value pairs containing custom field data specific to the helpdesk configuration.

attachments.description: File attachments associated with the ticket.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the ticket was created.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the ticket was last updated.

Attachment.description: A file attachment on a ticket.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the attachment was uploaded.
